caption: The video shows a person holding and pointing to a printed list of names paired with various Major League Baseball (MLB) team names. The list appears to be organized in two columns, with each name on the left corresponding to a team on the right. The person's finger moves along the list, highlighting different entries as they discuss or explain them. In the background, there are stacks of what seem to be card packs or boxes, suggesting that this might be related to sports card collecting or trading. A smaller inset in the bottom right corner shows another individual, possibly involved in the same activity, working at a desk with similar items around them. The setting seems to be an indoor space, likely a store or a dedicated area for card enthusiasts.
